name: nc-bioinformatics-figure-skills
description: Nature Communications-first bioinformatics figure visualization skill library built from GitHub-code-backed omics papers.

interface.shortDescription: 从 NC 优先、GitHub 可复现论文学习生信 Figure 可视化。
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that turns a 50-paper Nature Communications-first bioinformatics visualization library into reusable plotting skills, paper dissection workflows, figure planning templates, and R/Python plotting skeletons.
defaultPrompt: Use nc-bioinformatics-figure-skills when the user wants to learn Nature Communications bioinformatics figure visualization, inspect GitHub figure code, build plotting skill modules, or design manuscript figures from omics analysis results.
